Case# Conversation.Event.conversationUpdated(_:)

Updates a conversation’s attributes and capabilities.iOS 17.4+iPadOS 17.4+Mac Catalyst 17.4+visionOS 1.1+watchOS 10.4+

```
case conversationUpdated(Conversation.Update)
```

## [See Also](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationupdated(_:)#see-also)

[`case conversationConnected(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationconnected(_:))Informs that system that conversation successfully connected at a point in time.[`case conversationEnded(Date, Conversation.EndedReason)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationended(_:_:))Informs that system that a conversation ended at a point in time with a reason.[`case conversationStartedConnecting(Date)`](/documentation/livecommunicationkit/conversation/event/conversationstartedconnecting(_:))Informs the system that a conversation has started to connect participants at a point in time.
